batch_summary.note: Sep-Oct 2024 cluster: EP-0893 Sep 8 (73 msgs, FLOOD) + EP-0906 Sep 20 (16 msgs) + EP-0917 Oct 2 (173 msgs, FLOOD). 262 total hostile msgs. Phase A final peak. EP-0917 followed by B-020 behavioral silence (ADD-005).

primary_flags.escalation_shape: ramp — three hostile episodes escalating to EP-0917 peak

delta_profile.received_direction: ramp: 73 msgs then 16 msgs then 173 msgs — EP-0917 is the batch peak
delta_profile.net_escalation: high Sev-2 (262 total hostile msgs; EP-0917 alone is 173 msgs)
delta_profile.de_escalation_resistance: Eli measured through EP-0917 (173 msgs); no de-escalatory effect; post-EP-0917 silence is Melissa's withdrawal

primary_flags.cycle_classification: CYC-001 + CYC-004 compound; ADD-005 applies to post-EP-0917 silence
primary_flags.cross_rf_note: B-019 RF-04: 4 flags (2 Sev-2). EP-0917 co-occurs with RF-04 and RF-05 signals. Post-EP-0917 silence begins B-020 — cause unknown per CP2 Q4.

arc_updates.event: EP-0917 (173 msgs Oct 2 2024) is Phase A final peak. Followed by unexplained behavioral silence. Trajectory: Phase A extreme peak documented.
Eli measured throughout 173-msg exchange; no effect. Post-EP-0917 silence is Melissa's withdrawal per ADD-005.
